nasb.text: The one belonging to Ahab, who dies in the city, the dogs will eat, and the one who dies in the field the birds of heaven will eat.”

esv.text: Anyone belonging to Ahab who dies in the city the dogs shall eat, and anyone of his who dies in the open country the birds of the heavens shall eat.”

cnv.text: 屬亞哈的人，死在城裡的，必被野狗吃掉；死在田野的，必被空中的飛鳥吃掉。’”

ccb.text: 凡属亚哈的人，死在城中的必被狗吃，死在郊野的必被飞鸟吃。’”
